{"credits": [{"type": "finder", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/3975533?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/leesaenz/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/leesaenz/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/leesaenz/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/leesaenz/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/leesaenz", "id": 3975533, "login": "leesaenz", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjM5NzU1MzM=", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/leesaenz/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/leesaenz/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/leesaenz/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/leesaenz/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/leesaenz/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/leesaenz", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": 7.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-22", "name": "Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-73", "name": "External Control of File Name or Path"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-400", "name": "Uncontrolled Resource Consumption"}], "description": "### Impact

In Phantom <= 1.3.0, when `PHANTOM_OUTPUT_DIR` was unset (the default), the MCP tools accepted arbitrary absolute output paths with no confinement. Anything able to send tool calls (e.g. an AI agent driving the MCP interface) could **write or overwrite arbitrary files** the process user can write — including shell startup files (`~/.zshrc`) or a Reaper `__startup.lua`, which is effectively local code execution on a developer workstation.

Separately, the stem-separation and render paths decoded input audio with no size/duration cap (the analysis path was already guarded). A small, highly compressed FLAC/OGG could expand to multi-gigabyte PCM, causing memory-exhaustion DoS, and widened exposure to decoder bugs including libsndfile CVE-2026-37555.

### Patches
Fixed in **1.3.1**:
- File writes are always confined to `PHANTOM_OUTPUT_DIR` (default `~/.phantom/output`); symlinks resolved and re-verified on the final path.
- Decode/duration/size guards mirrored onto the separation and render paths (plus ffmpeg `-max_alloc`/`-t`/`-fs`).
- Atomic `O_CREAT|O_EXCL` output creation in reference matching and symlink-TOCTOU hardening on confined input reads.

### Workarounds
Set `PHANTOM_OUTPUT_DIR` (and optionally `PHANTOM_AUDIO_DIR`) to dedicated directories before starting the server.

### Credit
Found during an internal security audit.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-52vm-mxx8-f227", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-09T13:37:34Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-52vm-mxx8-f227", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-52vm-mxx8-f227"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-09T13:37:34Z", "references": ["https://github.com/fadelabs/phantom/security/advisories/GHSA-52vm-mxx8-f227", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-52vm-mxx8-f227"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/fadelabs/phantom/security-advisories/GHSA-52vm-mxx8-f227", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/fadelabs/phantom", "summary": "Phantom: Arbitrary file write and decode-bomb DoS via unconfined MCP tool paths", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-09T13:37:35Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-52vm-mxx8-f227", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.3.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "phantom-audio"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 1.3.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Phantom: Arbitrary file write and decode-bomb DoS via unconfined MCP tool paths
